English: Choose whether the display uses the modern widescreen-aware presentation or the original classic framing.
Limit very wide displays to a comfortable gameplay area while preserving readable interface composition.
Master switch for gamepad input. Disable to ignore the controller entirely.
Center deadzone for the analog sticks. Range 0% to 50% of full deflection.
Activation threshold for the analog triggers. Range 0% to 50%.
Filter the binding list by activity context.
Press Enter to rebind. Esc to cancel during capture.
Restore default %s bindings for this category only.
Invert vertical mouse motion - pushing the mouse forward looks down.
Swap left and right mouse buttons.
Right-side touch look and aim sensitivity. Range 0.25x to 3.0x.
Touch cursor movement sensitivity outside gameplay. Range 0.25x to 3.0x.
Auto shows touch controls when you're using touch and hides them when you switch to keyboard or a gamepad.
